personal.name: Behdad Morsalpoor
personal.location: Tehran, Iran (Relocating to Barcelona, Spain — Oct 2026)

summary: Senior Product Design Lead with 12+ years of experience scaling Fintech platforms (11M+ users). Combines a deep academic foundation in HCI and Cognitive Science with practical product strategy. Renowned for anticipating complex edge cases and ensuring technical feasibility through seamless alignment with Engineering and QA teams. A dedicated Design Advocate (podcast host) who translates advanced theoretical concepts into precise, high-fidelity flows that drive measurable OKRs.

experience.companyDescription: Leading Crypto Exchange in MENA, 11M+ Users
description: Led User Engagement Tribe: Directing 3 designers within a high-performance "Product Trio" culture, ensuring technical feasibility and aligning design initiatives with quarterly OKRs for an 11M+ user base.

Solved Critical Login Friction (HCI): Diagnosed a 52% login failure rate via qualitative research. Executed 3 iterative cycles to resolve 'bad password' patterns, boosting successful logins to 58% and reducing entry-point churn.
Orchestrated High-Traffic Scalability: Steered end-to-end UX for massive events (e.g., Hamster listing), handling 138,000 signups in 24h with an 80% trade success rate under extreme load.

experience.companyDescription: Leading Crypto Exchange in MENA, 11M+ Users
experience.focus: System Architecture, Complex Flows, Design Ops
description: Architected Complex Fintech Platforms: Engineered the Social Trading ecosystem (empowering 5k+ experts) and restructured the DEX (20k+ users), simplifying blockchain intricacies into intuitive, secure flows.
Established Scalable Design System: Built the foundational component library for a 10-person team, which standardized UI consistency and measurably accelerated the design-to-development handover.

experience.companyDescription: Largest Android App Store in Iran, 40M+ Users
experience.focus: Fintech Scaling, B2B SaaS, Rapid MVP Development
description: Optimized Fintech Ecosystem (Bazaar Pay): Architected a B2B transaction console for 18,000 active vendors to manage financial settlements. Conducted heuristic evaluations on the payment gateway, identifying friction points that led to a 25% increase in Direct Debit adoption.

Led Rapid MVP Launch (Fansee): Championed end-to-end product design of a celebrity-engagement platform (creator economy) within a cross-functional agile team. Delivered a fully functional product from concept to launch in just 3 months.

experience.focus: Advanced Trading Interfaces, HCI Research, Design Systems
description: Conceptualized Advanced Trading Platform: Led end-to-end design of a pro-level exchange (Spot/Order Book) across Web, Mobile, and Tablet. Delivered a robust Style Guide with Dark/Light themes, ensuring visual consistency and accessibility.

Driven by Behavioral Research (HCI): Conducted contextual inquiry sessions with professional traders, revealing critical insights (e.g., prioritizing Order Book visibility over Charts) that reshaped the UI hierarchy.

experience.focus: Design Systems, B2B SaaS, Agile Delivery
description: Architected Design System for B2B SaaS: Built the foundational Design System for a Product Information Management (PIM) platform, standardizing complex data visualization for rug vendors and enabling consistent UI scaling across the retailer network.
Accelerated Product Delivery: Led the rapid redesign and deployment of a localized Open-Source Crypto Exchange in under 2 months, meeting aggressive time-to-market goals.

Optimized E-commerce Funnel (Khazai Rugs): Reduced Home & Listing page bounce rates from 50% to ~30% by restructuring information architecture. Implemented a sequential selection pattern (progressive disclosure) for size/color attributes, significantly reducing cognitive load.

Deployed 4 Niche Platforms End-to-End: Designed 3 niche e-commerce sites and 1 service platform from scratch, creating comprehensive Style Guides. Utilized Heatmap analysis to realign service-page layouts with user intent.
Designed user interfaces for Iran's exclusive OTC financial market platform, focusing on complex data visualization and accessibility for financial professionals.
Designed interfaces for deep-tech startups at the intersection of Cognitive Science and Biotech, applying HCI principles to emerging technology products.
Co-founded and led all product design for a user-generated content food review platform in Kerman, Iran. Responsible for end-to-end UX from concept through launch.
Delivered UI/UX and graphic design for agency clients across branding, digital, and print projects in Kerman.

highlights: Thesis: "Algorithmic Assessment of Facial Aesthetics using Golden Ratio" — explored the intersection of mathematical harmony and visual perception, creating an early foundation for data-driven design thinking.
Specialized in Hardware Engineering, fostering a rigorous understanding of System Architecture, logic design, and resource constraints.

certifications: Human-Computer Interaction — edX & Georgia Institute of Technology
Dynamic User Experience: Design and Usability — Interaction Design Foundation
User Experience: The Beginner's Guide — Interaction Design Foundation
